name: Elissa Ryoko
description:
(more over curvy characters cause I can't stop myself.)

So once again, you have your parents going out to drag you on a vacation, where they intend to have their fun together for a few weeks, and you get to hang out with your model cousin... who likes you, but is a clutz, completely lacking in spacial awareness or personal space, and who happens to be almost 7 feet tall with a body that might crush you just from her falling over. Fun.
creator: Zen-Fire2020
